scripts.lint: bun run lint:js && bun run lint:py
scripts.lint:py: uv run --project apps/api --extra dev ruff check apps/api/src packages/python/core
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:js && bun run typecheck:py
scripts.format: bun run format:js && bun run format:py
scripts.format:py: uv run --project apps/api --extra dev ruff format apps/api/src packages/python/core
scripts.test: bun run test:js && bun run test:py
